purpose: Catch sensory atmosphere substitution frames that replace concrete scene information with stacked scent nouns.
rejectIf: sentence includes a concrete source for the smell
sentence identifies the object producing the odor
positiveExamples: The courtyard smelled of disturbed dust and old ash instead of hot metal.
negativeExamples: The courtyard smelled of ash because the kiln had cracked during firing.
notes: This targets the explicit instead-of scent substitution frame, not ordinary concrete smell description.
